title: Rahatgarh Heat Wave
lead: Rahatgarh is experiencing a critical heat wave with a Z-Score of +6.63. This event has reached a Score of 10.0/10, indicating extreme conditions.
body:
The current heat wave in Rahatgarh has led to extremely high temperatures, with a Cooling Degree Days (CDD) value of 22.2 GG. 
 The relative humidity is at 17%, which can exacerbate the perceived temperature. 
 The wind speed of 8.1 km/h offers little relief from the heat.
conclusion: Activate emergency response protocols immediately to mitigate the effects of the heat wave.
